name: Bittersweet Chocolate Ganache
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop or grate the chocolate into fine crumbs.
2. Heat the cream until small bubbles form around the edge; pour over the chocolate.
3. Process or stir to melt the chocolate completely. The mixture will be quite liquid.
4. Let it cool.
5. Beat in the brandy and vanilla. This process takes several hours at room temperature to achieve a spreading consistency. To speed the process, refrigerate. Stir occasionally to assure even chilling.
6. Use as a frosting.
